# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

REPLACE:kalmar_union = {
	color = "kalmar_orange"

	possible = {
		exists = c:SCA
		c:SCA ?= THIS
		RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		ruler = {
			has_culture = cu:danish
		}
	}
}

	color = "finnish_brown"

	possible = {
		exists = c:SCA
		c:SCA ?= THIS
		RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		ruler = {
			has_culture = cu:finnish
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:imperial_korea = {
	color = "korean_empire_purple"

	possible = {
		exists = c:KOR
		c:KOR ?= THIS
		RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		has_variable = KOR_korean_empire_declared
	}
}

REPLACE:korea_monarchy_blue = {
	color = "joseon_blue"
	possible = {
		exists = c:KOR
		c:KOR ?= THIS
		RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		NOT = {
			has_variable = KOR_korean_empire_declared
		}
	}
}

	color = "tokugawa_green"
	possible = {
		exists = c:JAP
		c:JAP ?= THIS
		RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		NOT = { has_variable = meiji_var }
	}
}

REPLACE:han_imperial_china = {
	color = "red_china"

	possible = {
		OR = {
			AND = {
				exists = c:CHI
				c:CHI ?= THIS
			}
			AND = {
				exists = c:BEI
				c:BEI ?= THIS
			}
		}
		NOT = { country_has_primary_culture = cu:manchu }
		RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
	}
}

REPLACE:empire_france = {
	color = "bonapartist_blue"

	possible = {
		exists = c:FRA
		c:FRA ?= THIS
		RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		has_variable = bonapartist_restoration_var
		has_variable = one_true_french_dynasty
	}
}

REPLACE:hre_atheist = {
	color = "sacrilegious_blue"

	possible = {
		exists = c:HRE
		c:HRE ?= THIS
		OR = {
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_theocracy
		}
		has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_state_atheism
	}
}

REPLACE:united_states_of_greater_austria = {
	color = "usga_grey"

	possible = {
		c:KUK ?= this
		was_formed_from = AUS
		RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
	}
}

REPLACE:bulgarian_empire = {
	color = "bulgaria_purple"

	possible = {
		c:BUL ?= this
		has_variable = bul_proclaimed_bulgarian_empire
		RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
	}
}
